name: Seito Camera
description: Lloguer de material audiovisual professional: càmeres ARRI (Alexa Mini, Mini LF), òptiques de cinema, material d'il·luminació i accessoris de producció. Forma part d'un hub audiovisual integrat a Sant Just (Barcelona) amb serveis complementaris paret amb paret: dos platós (un sinfin de 10m i una caixa negra de 280m²), taller de construcció de decorats, serveis de grua telescòpica i transport de producció. El client pot cobrir tots els serveis necessaris d'una producció en una sola localització amb una sola coordinació.
target_customers: executive producers / caps executius / CEOs of productoras — they make structural supplier decisions

freelance line producers and caps de producció — many of them move between productoras, so winning an individual relationship compounds across multiple projects. In Spain/Catalonia their public professional presence is as much on Instagram as on LinkedIn, since audiovisual freelancers use IG for portfolio and community
unique_strengths: True one-stop shop: Seito itself rents cameras, cinema optics AND lighting gear — plus the Sant Just hub wraps in two adjacent studios (10m-wide infinity cyc + 280m² black box), set construction workshop, telescopic crane services, and production transport. A client can cover an entire shoot at one address with one coordination
ARRI-specialized inventory (Alexa Mini, Mini LF) kept new, well-maintained and regularly reviewed — reduced mid-shoot failure risk
Hands-on technical support on-set — real humans who know the gear, not just a rental desk
DP-led advisory: the CEO is himself a working director of photography, so technical guidance comes from someone who actually shoots, not a salesperson
Trusted network of qualified technicians (operators, ACs, DITs) who already know Seito's specific inventory — Seito can recommend the right crew for the shoot, reducing ramp-up time
Commercial flexibility: competitive daily rates, meaningful volume discounts for preferred clients, and flexible availability windows (not only 9-to-6)
Personal, boutique relationship vs. the scale-first posture of Camaleón, Ovide and Servicevision
goals: Increase share among boutique productoras currently renting from Servicevision or Zig Zag
Capitalize on the Sant Just hub to sell 'integrated production' as a differentiated value proposition
excluded_segments: pure advertising or creative agencies that do not produce audiovisual content internally (i.e. they subcontract production to productoras and don't rent equipment themselves)
individual freelance filmmakers or solo DPs without a regular productora-level shoot schedule — they are occasional renters, not account-level targets
purely post-production or VFX companies — they don't rent cameras or lighting
